## Checklist

- [ ] `shellcheck ./*.sh` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or backup directories are committed
- [ ] Docs (`README.md` / `README_ja.md`) updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the "Unreleased" section
- [ ] I understand a maintainer will review this PR and may request changes
